message:
Command `RUNDIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/69-openroad-detailedrouting"
# Get latest DRT status from log
ls -la "$RUNDIR"/ 2>/dev/null | head -20
tail -30 "$RUNDIR"/or_metrics_out.json 2>/dev/null || echo "No metrics yet"
# Check if there's a log
find "$RUNDIR" -name "*.log" 2>/dev/null | head -5` executed with exit code 0.
